headline: Apple, Amazon, Others Not Seeking Tariff Refunds To Avoid Offending Trump? The President Says He'll 'Remember' Them
summary: President Donald Trump weighed in as major corporations, including Apple Inc. and Amazon Inc., reportedly avoided seeking tariff reimbursements. headline: Amazon Camp Stove Lawsuit Puts Marketplace Safety And Margins Under Scrutiny
summary: A new lawsuit in Washington state claims Amazon (NasdaqGS:AMZN) knowingly sold a defective camp stove that caused severe burns to a customer. The complaint alleges Amazon continued to list and promote the stove as a "Best Seller" despite multiple reports of gas leaks, uncontrolled flames, and construction issues. Plaintiffs argue Amazon breached its duty of reasonable care by actively recommending the product and failing to warn buyers about reported hazards. For investors watching...

content.title: Amazon Camp Stove Lawsuit Puts Marketplace Safety And Margins Under Scrutiny
content.summary: A new lawsuit in Washington state claims Amazon (NasdaqGS:AMZN) knowingly sold a defective camp stove that caused severe burns to a customer. The complaint alleges Amazon continued to list and promote the stove as a "Best Seller" despite multiple reports of gas leaks, uncontrolled flames, and construction issues. Plaintiffs argue Amazon breached its duty of reasonable care by actively recommending the product and failing to warn buyers about reported hazards. For investors watching...
